meaning: n.老年医学专家 老年病学专家 老人学专家
examples: To a geriatrician, though, it is a medical problem.
Yusra Hussain is a clinical instructor a geriatrician.
He was in medical school, studying to be a geriatrician.
You may also be referred to a specialist in diagnosing dementia or memory disorders, such as a neurologist, psychiatrist, psychologist or geriatrician.
Geriatrician Bill Thomas, who helped Holy Cross design the seniors ER, says traditional emergency rooms were set up to be good at treating trauma and to treat it quickly.
